step_rationale: miRNA linked to vascular remodeling and endothelial dysfunction in coronary stenosis.
mechanism: miR-222 regulates vascular remodeling and endothelial function influencing plaque stability and coronary stenosis severity.

references.title: Associations of Circulating microRNA-221 and 222 With the Severity of Coronary Artery Lesions in Acute Coronary Syndrome Patients.
